title: 60Pcs Jigsaw Blades Set, T Shank Jig Saw Blades for Wood Plastic and Metal Cutting, 7 Types Straight and Fast Cuts HCS/HSS Jigsaw Blade Compatible with Festool, Bosch, Hitachi, Milwaukee, Makita
features: 【60Pcs Jigsaw Blade Set】: 60 Pieces Set includes 10pcs T144D, 10pcs T244D, 10*T101AO, 10*T101B, 10*T101BR, 5*T118A, 5*T118B, widely meet your different needs(T144D, T244D, T101B, fit wood straight, clean, fine cuts, T101BR and T101AO fit wood curved cuts, T118A and T118B fit metal straight cuts thin metals). Compared with the single and high-priced other saw blades, we have enough cost-effective.

【Quality And Durability】: T Shank jigsaw blades assortment of blades made of high-quality high carbon steel materials, which can improve the quality and precise cutting, that withstand tough conditions and frequent use. Blades offer exceptional durability and longevity, minimizing interruptions, efficiency on the job site.

【Quick and Precise】Various tooth designs, which can be cut quickly or finely; From woodworking to plastic, PVC, metal, jigsaw blades excel in precise, fine, clean cuts various applications, meet the demands of any cutting job.
【Easy To Carry】: Set includes 6 independent packaging to keep wood metal jig saw blades organized, easy to identify for easy access

【Universal Compatibility】:. The T-shank design gives it good stability and grip, you can trust that they will securely attach to your tool, ensure stability and safety during work. Suitable for most jig saws on the market. Compatible with Festool, Bosch, Makita, Milwaukee and Many More Brand
description: Product Description Different sizes can meet your different needs. Various tooth designs, which can be cut quickly or finely; precise grinding, which can cut wood and plastic quickly and cleanly These jig saw blades are made of high quality high carbon steel, which can improve the quality and precise cutting. T-handle design can maximize grip and stability. Suitable for most jig saws on the market. T118A 5-Piece Saw Length 76mm Tooth Length 52mm Suitable for sawing thin metal T118B 5-Piece Saw Length 76mm Tooth Length 52mm Suitable for sawing thin metal T101AO 10-Piece Saw Length 83mm Tooth Length 56mm Suitable for Saw-Cumber Cutting T101B 10-Piece Saw Length 100mm Tooth Length 76 mm Suitable for sawn wood T101BR 10-Piece Saw Length 100mm Tooth Length 75mm Suitable for sawn wood T144D 10-Piece Saw Length 100mm Tooth Length 77mm Suitable for sawn wood T244D 10-Piece Saw Length 100mm Tooth Length 75mm Suitable for Saw-curve cutting Various tooth designs, which can be cut quickly or finely
